mission.title: fluent-bit: Multiline filter crashes after buffer limit is reached causing high cpu and memory usage
mission.description: Multiline filter crashes after buffer limit is reached causing high cpu and memory usage. This issue affects 24+ users.

steps.title: Identify fluent-bit troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your fluent-bit deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n fluent-bit -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluent-bit
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluent-bit -n fluent-bit --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review fluent-bit configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant fluent-bit configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n fluent-bit -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluent-bit
kubectl get configmap -n fluent-bit -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=fluent-bit
```
Hello 

Multiline filter is crashing on pods that generate a large amount of logs after reaching  Emitter_Mem_Buf_Limit .

steps.title: Apply the fix for Multiline filter crashes after buffer limit is reached…
steps.description:
Multiple fitler means like I show in the issue like this:

```
[FILTER]
     name                  multiline
     match                 *
     multiline.key_content log
     multiline.parser	   go

[FILTER]
     name                  multiline
     match                 *
     multiline.key_content
```yaml
[2022/02/25 15:40:06] [ info] [input:tail:tail.0] inode=4540032 handle rotation(): /var/log/containers/xxxxx.log => /var/lib/docker/containers/xxxxx/xxxxx-json.log.5
[2022/02/25 15:40:06] [ info] [input:tail:tail.0] inotify_fs_add(): inode=4540032 watch_fd=113 name=/var/lib/docker/containers/xxxxx/xxxxx-json.log.5
[2022/02/25 15:40:07] [ info] [input:tail:tail.0] inotify_fs_remove(): inode=4592513 watch_fd=111
[2022/02/25 15:40:12] [ info] [input:tail:tail.0] inotify_fs_remove(): inode=3353782 watch_fd=112
[2022/02/25 15:40:12] [ info] [input:tail:tail.0] inotify_fs_remove(): inode=4540032 wat
```

steps.title: Confirm Multiline filter crashes after buffer limit is… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluent-bit -n fluent-bit --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n fluent-bit --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
Multiple fitler means like I show in the issue like this:

```
[FILTER]
     name                  multiline
     match                 *
     multiline.key_content log
     multiline.parser	   go

[FILTER]
     name                  multiline
     match                 *
     multiline.key_content log
     multiline.parser      multiline-regex-test
```

Instead, the CORRECT way is what you show,
codeSnippets:
[2022/02/25 15:40:06] [ info] [input:tail:tail.0] inode=4540032 handle rotation(): /var/log/containers/xxxxx.log => /var/lib/docker/containers/xxxxx/xxxxx-json.log.5
[2022/02/25 15:40:06] [ info] [input:tail:tail.0] inotify_fs_add(): inode=4540032 watch_fd=113 name=/var/lib/docker/containers/xxxxx/xxxxx-json.log.5
[2022/02/25 15:40:07] [ info] [input:tail:tail.0] inotify_fs_remove(): inode=4592513 watch_fd=111
[2022/02/25 15:40:12] [ info] [input:tail:tail.0] inotify_fs_remove(): inode=3353782 watch_fd=112
[2022/02/25 15:40:12] [ info] [input:tail:tail.0] inotify_fs_remove(): inode=4540032 watch_fd=113
[2022/02/25 15:40:27] [ info] [input:tail:tail.0] inode=3353789 handle rotation(): /var/log/containers/xxxxx.log => /var/lib/docker/containers/xxxxx/xxxxx-json.log.7
[2022/02/25 15:40:27] [

[INPUT]
        Name tail
        Path /var/log/containers/*.log
        DB /var/log/containers/fluentbit_db.db
        Parser docker
        Tag kube.*
        Mem_Buf_Limit 10MB
        Buffer_Chunk_Size 256k
        Buffer_Max_Size 256k
        Skip_Long_Lines On
        Refresh_Interval 1
        multiline.parser docker,cri
......


    [FILTER]
        name multiline
        Emitter_Mem_Buf_Limit 2.4GB
        match kube.*
        multiline.key_content log
        multiline.parser java,go,python
    [FILTER]
        Name kubernetes
        Buffer_Size 512k
        Match kube.*
        Merge_Log On
        Merge_Log_Key log_json
        Merge_Log_Trim On
        Keep_Log On
        K8S-Logging.Parser On
        K8S-Logging.Exclude On

....

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with fluent-bit installed or the issue environment reproducible.
